creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #3)
> (In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #2)
> 
> I remember grepping the ports tree for references to llvm39 and not finding
> any.  That's why I told brooks to proceed.

To be clear. I have no axe to grind in this. As I don't use either
of the versions in question.
But if I may be so bold. IMHO, and from my vantage point. It
appears that an EOL notice might have been a more powerful
version of grep. ;)

Thank you, very much Mark. For taking the time to respond.

--Chris
